title: A PARTICIPAÇÃO DAS VÍTIMAS NAS CLAIMS RESOLUTION FACILITIES: O QUE A AMÉRICA DO SUL TEM A CONSIDERAR A PARTIR DA EXPERIÊNCIA ESTRANGEIRA?
author: Catharina Peçanha Martins Oroso
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The following article aims to study the possibility of application of the claims resolution facilities institute in South American Law, from the exposure of three types of cases (answer to acts of terror, acts of war, and environmental damage).
steps_raw: The following article aims to study the possibility of application of the claims resolution facilities institute in South American Law, from the exposure of three types of cases (answer to acts of terror, acts of war, and environmental damage).
